T0491.definition: A unique and indivisible digital asset token on a blockchain, where each NFT possesses a distinct identifier and associated metadata.
T0491.description: NFTs enable proof of ownership and transferability of digital assets through smart contract standards such as ERC-721. They are widely utilized in domains including digital art, gaming items, and virtual land. The uniqueness of NFTs makes them a critical infrastructure for the metaverse economy. However, they also face security challenges such as royalty circumvention, metadata tampering, and fraudulent minting.
T0491.usageExample: An artist mints and sells a digital painting as an NFT on OpenSea, granting the buyer on-chain proof of ownership for the artwork.
T0491.title: NFT
